decision_point: In an adult with acute, uncomplicated coccydynia, is nonoperative pelvic unloading (ergonomic cushions, NSAIDs) or surgical coccygectomy preferred?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with acute, uncomplicated coccydynia, is nonoperative pelvic unloading (ergonomic cushions, NSAIDs) or surgical coccygectomy preferred?
Options:
  1. Nonoperative pelvic unloading
  2. Surgical coccygectomy
label: settled
label_rationale: Conservative management resolves over 90% of cases; surgical coccygectomy is highly invasive with high wound contamination risks and is not indicated.
